visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient covers entire landing hero; some UI labels (environment pills, gallery metadata) appear below 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large emoji-labeled object tiles, playful AI Buddy tone, suggestion chips, and colorful theme pills are clearly child-oriented; minor complexity from multi-panel builder layout

visual-consistency.notes: Landing, builder, and gallery share brand colors and rounded style, but save-after-reload variant has a different layout structure, button palette, and missing AI panel

visual-accessibility.notes: Object tiles and nav buttons have text labels; selected states visible on categories and environment pills; white-on-purple hero contrast is borderline; no keyboard focus rings observed
